display_text: Cost: 0: Martyr's Plate is a neutral item with the Martyrdom active ability that redirects 25% of magic damage from allied heroes within a 900 radius to you for 10 seconds, sacrificing yourself to protect the team. Stats: CD: 40s, Duration: 10s, Aura Radius: 900.

display_text: Cost: 0: Ideal for tanky heroes facing heavy magic damage lineups, as the self-redirection synergizes with high health pools and magic resistance. It excels in team compositions where you can reliably stand near your cores to absorb damage. Stats: Magic Resist: +25%, HP Regen: +7.
